weekly_summary: Over the past 7 days, our security landscape has been characterized by 20 total findings across 11 unique CVEs, with no single vulnerability dominating the landscape as each of the identified CVEs, including CVE-2026-41940, CVE-2026-31431, and CVE-2026-1858, was observed only once. The threats were dispersed across various security domains, including Browser Extensions, Cloud/IAM, and OS/Kernel, among others. The most active day was May 3, 2026, indicating a recent surge in security incidents, highlighting the need for continued vigilance and proactive measures to mitigate potential risks.
